economic_notes: Nation holds interests in fishing (Ehattesaht Fishing Corporation, Hayu Fishing Ltd., Hayu Fishing LP), forestry (Aat'uu Forestry Ltd., Aat'uu Forestry LP), hydro (Barr Creek Hydro Ltd., Zeballos Lake Hydro LP), and holding companies (0754140 BC Ltd., 0881643 BC Ltd.). All accounted for by modified equity method. Royalties income of $259,522 noted.
notes: Audit is qualified because audits were not performed for all affiliated entities, making it impossible to verify the Investments in First Nation Affiliated Entities balance and related GBE income. Nation has 9 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. No ISC/INAC funding is separately identified; Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council ($2,662,210) appears to be the primary government transfer conduit. CMHC ($8,775) and Province of BC ($549,146) also included in total government transfers. First Peoples Heritage ($262,668) treated as government transfer. No schedule of remuneration provided. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022, not 2024.
